task_completion.description: Log in to the Aerobridge admin panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the Django administration login page or dashboard at http://localhost:8000/admin/ with the agent logged in.

task_completion.description: Enter the target username and password in the Add User form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add user' form shows the Username field filled with 'ops_coordinator' and the password fields filled.

task_completion.description: Enter the user's first name, last name, and email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user edit form shows First name as 'Maria', Last name as 'Rodriguez', and Email address as 'maria.rodriguez@skyviewaerial.io'.

task_completion.description: Configure the correct staff and superuser permissions
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Permissions section of the user form, the 'Staff status' checkbox is CHECKED, and the 'Superuser status' checkbox is UNCHECKED.

task_completion.description: Successfully save the new user account
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success banner indicating the user 'ops_coordinator' was added/changed successfully, or the user 'ops_coordinator' is visible in the Users list.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the GUI, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI using terminal database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'python manage.py createsuperuser', 'sqlite3', or Django shell commands to create the user directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Aerobridge admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Django administration styling and is accessed via localhost:8000/admin/, not a local HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Username: 'ops_coordinator'. Target First Name: 'Maria'. Target Last Name: 'Rodriguez'. Target Email: 'maria.rodriguez@skyviewaerial.io'. Target Permissions: is_staff must be TRUE (Staff status checked), is_superuser must be FALSE (Superuser status unchecked - CRITICAL). Admin URL: http://localhost:8000/admin/.
